Neptune Serverless Instance Type Features and Configuration

The `serverless` instance type refers to the Neptune Serverless feature.
Neptune Serverless is a feature of Amazon Neptune.
Neptune Serverless can scale instance size dynamically based on a workload's resource needs.
Neptune Serverless lets users set lower and upper limits on compute capacity for the instances in a DB cluster.
Compute capacity in Neptune Serverless is measured in Neptune Capacity Units.
Neptune Serverless eliminates the need to calculate how many vCPUs are needed for an application.
Workloads with varying utilization can be cost-optimized by using serverless rather than provisioned instances.
Both provisioned and serverless instances can be set up in the same DB cluster.
Setting up both provisioned and serverless instances in the same DB cluster can achieve an optimal cost-performance configuration.
